hero.badge: Shopify App for Engraving & Print Shops

features.title: Everything Your Shop Needs
features.subtitle: From customer design to production-ready files — in one app.

canvasEditor.title: Canvas Editor
canvasEditor.description: Drag & drop designer with text, images, QR codes and shapes. Your customers design directly in the browser.

engravingPrint.title: Engraving & Print
engravingPrint.description: Laser engraving, UV printing, sublimation — one tool for all production methods.

noCodeSetup.title: No-Code Setup
noCodeSetup.description: 7-step wizard. Configure products, assign materials, activate tools — without a single line of code.

productionFiles.title: Production Files
productionFiles.description: SVG, PNG, PDF export. Ready for your machines.

showcase.title: See Etchify in Action
showcase.subtitle: From dashboard to checkout — this is your new workflow.

dashboard.title: Install & Get Started Instantly
dashboard.description: The Etchify dashboard right inside Shopify. Set up products, manage materials, customize branding — all in one place.

configurator.title: Your Customers Design Themselves
configurator.description: Choose material, add elements, position on the canvas — the configurator turns visitors into designers.

engraving.title: Real-Time Results
engraving.description: Enter text, adjust font and size — your customers instantly see how the engraving looks on the material.

cart.title: Seamless Checkout
cart.description: The personalized product lands in the cart with all details. Engraving, material, side — everything clean for production.

step1.title: Set Up Products
step1.description: Choose products, assign materials and geometries, activate tools — all in the wizard.

step2.title: Customers Design
step2.description: Your customers open the configurator, create their design and add it to the cart.

step3.title: You Produce
step3.description: Download the production file — SVG for laser, PNG for print. Done.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start for free. Upgrade as you grow.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Etchify.

whatIsEtchify.question: What is Etchify?
whatIsEtchify.answer: Etchify is a Shopify app that lets your customers personalize products directly in your shop — engravings, prints, text, images and more. You receive production-ready files and can start right away.

howSetup.question: How quickly can I set up Etchify?
howSetup.answer: In under 5 minutes. Our 7-step wizard guides you through setup — select products, assign materials, activate tools. No code required.

shopifyPlans.question: Which Shopify plans are supported?
shopifyPlans.answer: Etchify works with all Shopify plans — Basic, Shopify, Advanced and Plus.

productionMethods.question: Which production methods are supported?
productionMethods.answer: Laser engraving, UV printing, sublimation and more. Etchify generates production-ready files in SVG, PNG and PDF — ready for your machines.

freeTrial.question: Is there a free plan?
freeTrial.answer: Yes! The Free plan includes the Canvas Editor, text & shapes, SVG export and community support — for 1 product. No credit card required.

customization.question: Can I customize the configurator to match my shop design?
customization.answer: Yes. Etchify automatically adapts to your Shopify theme. On the Business plan, you can also use custom branding to fully match the configurator to your brand.
